title: PVC Hexagonal Promo Mat 12pcs Asst Colours
features: PVC Hexagonal Promo Mat 12pcs Asst Colours
description: Blue Canyon PVC Hexagonal Promo Bath Mat 12-Piece Set made of high qulaity polyvinyl chloride material. These bath mats, are practical and hard wearing. Featuring a modern transparent hexagon design with a anti-slip textured surface. Slip resistant suction cups. Quick draining design with self draining abilities. Suction pads to secure the mat for safety.
